title: Spiesia dichroantha
taxonomy: Spiesia dichroantha is a plant species within the genus Spiesia, which is a part of the Fabaceae family. This family is commonly known as the legume or pea family, consisting of a vast array of flowering plants. The genus Spiesia is often classified as a synonym of the genus Meconopsis, but some sources may still recognize it as a distinct genus. The plant is native to certain regions, but the exact classification and distribution may vary depending on the source. Further research is necessary to confirm the current classification and naming conventions for Spiesia dichroantha.

benefits: Spiesia dichroantha, also known as the Himalayan gentian, is a plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits.
